select.if:
SELECT * FROM budget_quota WHERE deleted = 0 AND (morg_code, project_code, custom_code, account_subject_code, period_id, budget_type) IN
(#{item.morgCode}, #{item.projectCode}, #{item.customCode}, #{item.accountSubjectCode}, #{item.periodId}, #{item.budgetType})

update.foreach: UPDATE budget_quota SET pool_id = #{item.poolId}, morg_code = #{item.morgCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_code = #{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, custom_code = #{item.customCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, account_subject_code = #{item.accountSubjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, erp_asset_type = #{item.erpAssetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_internal = #{item.isInternal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, year = #{item.year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quarter = #{item.quarter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, budget_type = #{item.budgetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, currency = #{item.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{item.version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, amount_total = #{item.amountTotal}, amount_total_vchanged = #{item.amountTotalVchanged}, amount_adj = #{item.amountAdj}, amount_pay = #{item.amountPay}, amount_pay_vchanged = #{item.amountPayVchanged}, amount_available_adj = #{item.amountAvailableAdj}, amount_pay_adj = #{item.amountPayAdj}, updater = #{item.updater,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = SYSTIMESTAMP, deleted = #{item.deleted} WHERE id = #{item.id}
